reference: Hi, I am Kulsum. I am twenty-two years old and I am eight weeks pregnant. After four years of marriage, I got pregnant. Today, I was not aware that during pregnancy we should not eat sabudana, so is it safe? I am very worried after eating that because everyone says that we should only eat sabudana after eight months. Please suggest me.
text: Hi, I am. I am 22 years old and I am eight weeks pregnant. After four years of marriage, I got pregnant. Today, I was not aware that during pregnancy we should not eat sabudana. So, is it safe? I am very worried after eating that because everyone says that we should only eat sabudana after eight months. Please suggest me.
